debug_info.goal:
case intro
R : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : CommRing R
S : Type u_2
inst✝ : CommRing S
f : R →+* S
x : R ⧸ ker f
x' : R
hx : (@GlimpseOfLean.kerLift R inst✝¹ S inst✝ f) ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x') = 0
hx' : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = x
⊢ (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0

proof:
have h : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
    have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    rw [h₂] at h₁
    exact h₁
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h
  have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₃
  simpa [hx'] using h₄
failed_attempts:
have h₁ : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    rw [h₂] at hx
    simpa using hx
  have h₂ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₁
  have h₃ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₂
  exact h₃

end GlimpseOfLean

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
  have h2 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    apply kerLift_mk
  rw [h2] at h1
  have h3 : f x' = 0 := by simpa using h1
  have h4 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h3
  have h5 : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' : R ⧸ ker f) = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.mk_eq_zero]
    exact h4
  rw [h5]

have h₁ : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
    have h₃ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    exact h₂
  have h₂ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₁
  have h₃ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_of_mem h₂
  simpa using h₃

have h1 : (@GlimpseOfLean.kerLift R inst✝¹ S inst✝ f) ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x') = f x' := by
    have h1 : (Ideal.Quotient.lift (ker f) f (by
      intro x hx
      simp_all [Ideal.mem_ker])) (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      simp [Ideal.Quotient.lift_mk]
    have h2 : (Ideal.Quotient.lift (ker f) f (by
      intro x hx
      simp_all [Ideal.mem_ker])) = @GlimpseOfLean.kerLift R inst✝¹ S inst✝ f := by
      rfl
    rw [h2] at h1
    exact h1
  
  have h2 : f x' = 0 := by
    have h3 : (@GlimpseOfLean.kerLift R inst✝¹ S inst✝ f) ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x') = 0 := by
      simpa [hx'] using hx
    have h4 : (@GlimpseOfLean.kerLift R inst✝¹ S inst✝ f) ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x') = f x' := h1
    rw [h4] at h3
    exact h3
  
  have h3 : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    have h4 : x' ∈ (ker f : Ideal R) := by
      simp_all [Ideal.mem_ker]
    have h5 : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
      apply Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr
      exact h4
    exact h5
  
  simp_all

have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    sorry
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := by
    sorry
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    sorry
  have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    sorry
  have h₅ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    sorry
  sorry

have h₁ : f x' = 0 := by
    rw [kerLift_mk] at hx
    simpa [hx'] using hx
  have h₂ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    simpa [h₁] using h₁
  have h₃ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₂
  exact h₃

have h₁ : f x' = 0 := by
    calc
      f x' = kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') := by rw [kerLift_mk f x']
      _ = 0 := hx
  have h₂ : x' ∈ (ker f : Ideal R) := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    simpa using h₁
  have h₃ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' : R ⧸ (ker f : Ideal R)) = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₂
  simpa using h₃

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    exact kerLift_mk f x'
  have h2 : f x' = 0 := by
    have h2₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by simpa [hx'] using hx
    have h2₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := h1
    rw [h2₂] at h2₁
    exact h2₁
  
  have h3 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    have h3₁ : f x' = 0 := h2
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h3₁
  
  have h4 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    have h4₁ : x' ∈ (ker f : Ideal R) := h3
    have h4₂ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
      apply Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr
      exact h4₁
    exact h4₂
  
  simpa [hx'] using h4

have h : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    simp_all [kerLift_mk]
  have h₁ : x' ∈ (ker f : Ideal R) := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] at h
    exact h
  have h₂ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' : R ⧸ ker f) = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.mk_eq_zero]
    <;> simpa using h₁
  simp_all [hx']

have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by sorry
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := by
    rw [h₁] at hx
    simpa using hx
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h₂
  have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₃
  rw [h₄]
  <;> simp

exact hx
    have h₃ : (kerLift f) (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := kerLift_mk f x'
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    exact h₂
  have h₂ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₁
  rw [hx', h₂]
  <;> simp

<;>
    (try norm_cast at h₃) <;>
    (try ring_nf at h₃) <;>
    (try simp_all [Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_sub, Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_C_mul,
      Polynomial.coeff_X_pow, pow_two]) <;>
    (try norm_num at h₃) <;>
    (try {
      have h₄ : m ≤ 3 := by
        by_contra h₅
        have h₆ : m ≥ 4 := by linarith
        have h₇ : m ^ 2 ≥ 16 := by nlinarith
        have h₈ : (m : ℕ) ^ 2 ≥ 16 := by exact_mod_cast h₇
        norm_num

have h1 : f x' = 0 := by
    have h : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
    have h2 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      rw [kerLift_mk]
    rw [h2] at h
    exact h
  
  have h2 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    have h3 : f x' = 0 := h1
    have h4 : x' ∈ ker f := by
      rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
      exact h3
    exact h4
  
  have h3 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    have h4 : x' ∈ ker f := h2
    have h5 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
      -- Use the property of the quotient ring that if an element is in the ideal, its image is zero.
      have h6 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
        -- Use the fact that x' is in the kernel of f to show that its image in the quotient ring is zero.
        have h7 : x' ∈ ker f := h4
        have h8 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
          -- Use the property of the quotient ring that if an element is in the ideal, its image is zero.
          rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
          exact h7
        exact h8
      exact h6
    exact h5
  
  exact h3

have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
  have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    apply kerLift_mk
  have h₃ : f x' = 0 := by
    rw [h₂] at h₁
    exact h₁
  have h₄ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [Ideal.mem_ker]
    exact h₃
  have h₅ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₄
  rw [h₅]

exact h₃
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₂
  have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₃
  rw [hx']
  exact h₄

have h : f x' = 0 := by
    simp [hx, kerLift_mk] at hx ⊢
    <;> simpa using hx
  have h₂ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    simpa [h] using h
  have h₃ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₂
  exact h₃

have h₃ : f x' = 0 := h₁
  have h₄ : x' ∈ (ker f : Set R) := by
    have h₅ : f x' = 0 := h₃
    exact mem_ker.dsymm.mp h₅
  have h₅ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₄
  rw [h₅]
  <;> simp
successful_attempts:
have h : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
    have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    rw [h₂] at h₁
    exact h₁
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h
  have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₃
  simpa [hx'] using h₄

have h : x' ∈ ker f ↔ f x' = 0 := by
    simp [mem_ker]
  have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    apply kerLift_mk
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := by
    calc
      f x' = kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') := by rw [h₁]
      _ = 0 := by simpa [hx'] using hx
  have h₃ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    have h₄ : x' ∈ ker f := by
      simp_all [h, mem_ker]
    simpa [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] using h₄
  simp_all

have h₁ : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
    have h₃ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      simpa [kerLift_mk] using kerLift_mk f x'
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    exact h₂
  have h₂ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₁
  have h₃ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₂
  rw [h₃]
  <;> simp_all

have h : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    apply kerLift_mk
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := by
    rw [h₁] at h
    simpa using h
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    simpa using h₂
  have h₄ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    simpa using h₃
  rw [h₄]

have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := hx
  have h₂ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    rw [kerLift_mk]
  have h₃ : f x' = 0 := by
    rw [h₂] at h₁
    exact h₁
  have h₄ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₃
  have h₅ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' : R ⧸ ker f) = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₄
  rw [h₅]

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by simpa using hx
  have h2 : f x' = 0 := by
    have h3 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    rw [h3] at h1
    simpa using h1
  have h3 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    simpa using h2
  have h4 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    <;> simpa using h3
  simpa using h4

have h : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    apply kerLift_mk
  rw [h] at hx
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := hx
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h₂
  have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₃
  exact h₄

have h : f x' = 0 := by simpa [kerLift_mk] using hx
  have h' : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h
  have h'' : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h'
  simpa [hx'] using h''

have h1 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    have h2 : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    exact h2
  rw [h1] at hx
  have h3 : f x' = 0 := by simpa using hx
  have h4 : x' ∈ ker f := by
    simpa [mem_ker] using h3
  have h5 : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h4
  rw [h5]

have h : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    rw [h₁] at hx
    exact hx
  
  have h₁ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h
  
  have h₂ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := h₁
    have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
      apply Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mpr
      exact h₃
    exact h₄
  
  rw [h₂]
  <;> simp_all
  <;> try simp_all [Ideal.Quotient.mk_surjective]
  <;> try simp_all [Ideal.Quotient.mk_eq_zero]
  <;> try simp_all [mem_ker]

have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
    calc
      kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = Ideal.Quotient.lift (ker f) f (fun x => by simpa [mem_ker] using x.prop) (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') := rfl
      _ = f x' := by
        rw [Ideal.Quotient.lift_mk]
        <;> simp [mem_ker]
        <;> aesop
  
  have h₂ : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₃ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = 0 := by simpa [hx'] using hx
    rw [h₁] at h₃
    exact h₃
  
  have h₃ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    have h₄ : f x' = 0 := h₂
    simp [mem_ker] at h₄ ⊢
    <;> simpa using h₄
  
  have h₄ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
    have h₅ : x' ∈ ker f := h₃
    have h₆ : Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x' = 0 := by
      rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
      <;> simpa [mem_ker] using h₅
    exact h₆
  
  simp_all [hx']

have h : f x' = 0 := by
    have h₁ : kerLift f (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f) x') = f x' := by
      apply kerLift_mk
    rw [h₁] at hx
    exact hx
  have h₂ : x' ∈ ker f := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    exact h
  have h₃ : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0 := by
    rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
    exact h₂
  rw [h₃]
